scope_of_certificate: The thesis-native (Garrido-Rios 2017 Op1-Op13) plus minimally-justified-extension decision envelope, under canonical order-level ReT (ret_excel_visible_v1), equal resources, strong same-contract open-loop and classical comparators, and thesis-compatible physics. This is NOT a claim about all DES or all RL.
not_certified: Universal impossibility of adaptive value in supply-chain DES
Impossibility under domain facts the thesis does not supply (see garrido_reopen_questions)

evidence_budget_discharged.independent_candidate_generation: 12 blind proposers, one distinct mechanism region each
evidence_budget_discharged.top_families_implemented_or_precisely_bl: 2 BLOCKED families each carry an exact falsifiable Garrido question
evidence_budget_discharged.action_trajectory_audit: K3 open-loop period-8 confound reproduced bit-for-bit

candidate_screen_result.method: 49 agents (12 propose x 3 audit + 1 synthesize), 0 errors, 2.9M tokens

full_DES_max_H_PI.H_obs: ~0 (Program E: 0/10 PPO seeds, tree, heuristic, convex mixture)

strongest_headroom_found.note: Positive-H_obs cells coincide with the high surge x high commonality scarcity-by-concurrency region that fails the worst-CSSU fairness guardrail (Program I).

generative_invariants_that_close_the_env: Unlimited storage (thesis 6.5) + stationary demand + holding-cost-blind ReT => 'maximal-readiness' constant is optimal; no dynamic reservation value.
Proactive buffers sized for 120h R21 recovery damp short memoryless disruptions (R11 ~2h, R22 ~24h) => convertible signal lead collapses to ~0.
Single-server / serial-line restoration time = sum of repair durations (order-invariant) => 'which-first' sequencing has ~0 ReT effect.
No pre-action forecast channel (R24 onset simultaneous with impact; R23 no precursor) => periodic-calendar sufficiency; observable state cannot predict the right action before it is needed.
Backorder system-of-record captures REQUESTED quantity (pending cap 60) => demand is not censored; EVPI of paid sensing is ~0.
Canonical ReT counts an expired-in-denominator order identically to a lost backorder => admission/expiry estimand collapses to closed D1.

garrido_reopen_questions.question: Do theatre (esp. R24 contingent) requirements carry a HARD fulfillment deadline after which the unfilled quantity is PERMANENTLY ABANDONED (not backordered), does the logistics agency hold doctrinal authority to triage/decline orders into the pipeline, and is the deadline distribution TIGHTER than the 24-120h R21/R23/R22 recovery timescales?
garrido_reopen_questions.falsifies_if: deadlines absent, looser than recovery times, or orders always backorder -> collapses to closed D1
garrido_reopen_questions.even_if_granted_risk: myopic contingent-EDD + Moore-Hodgson rule likely captures it; clairvoyant-to-myopic gap is unobservable future timing (DRA2b/H EVPI-without-conversion)

garrido_reopen_questions.question: For R22-affected legs (Op4/Op8/Op10/Op12) does a physically distinct ALTERNATE route exist (with quantified extra transit + vehicle-hour cost), is R22 ROUTE-SPECIFIC (blocks primary, spares alternate) rather than degrading the whole O-D leg, and is its recovery PERSISTENTLY AUTOCORRELATED and long relative to the 24h leg so route status at dispatch predicts route status at arrival?
garrido_reopen_questions.falsifies_if: R22 is ~24h memoryless, single-leg, or path-agnostic -> buffer intercept + resource purchase (reproduces DRA2->E)
garrido_reopen_questions.even_if_granted_risk: 'always-primary + let the buffer absorb' constant weakly dominates at lower vehicle-hours

recommended_portfolio.paper2_primary: EVPI-without-conversion boundary + physics-invariant failure atlas (value-of-information ceiling for adaptive resilience control). Distinct from Paper 1 (eligibility/comparator methodology on Track A/B). Anchor: H_PI-vs-eta decomposition across full-DES + stylized; 17-family taxonomy mapped to invariants; K3 open-loop confound as methodological result.
recommended_portfolio.paper2_journal: Simulation Modelling Practice and Theory or Journal of Simulation (methods-forward); Computers & Industrial Engineering fallback
recommended_portfolio.paper3_primary_conditional: Constructive inverse: eight necessary conditions for deployable adaptive value + minimal disclosed physics perturbation per condition; preregistered Garrido elicitation on R03/R09 that CONVERTS (positive) or CERTIFY-CLOSES them.
recommended_portfolio.paper3_fallback_A: Metric-induced policy ranking reversal / resilience construct validity (Program G canonical-vs-proxy reversal, Cobb-Douglas sensitivity, worst-CSSU fairness) - self-contained, no Garrido facts needed.
recommended_portfolio.paper3_fallback_B_retained_learning: Only if a positive adaptive policy is first established (currently not; reserved as Paper 1 future work).

required_next_provenance_action: Tag+push the 7 unpushed local commits (373aa6ab..ef6b53b7, incl. K3 retraction) to an immutable remote ref before any Paper 2 claim rests on them (push gated on user approval).
